queue.title: Gestalt Principles: Design Intuitive Interfaces | Course Preview
queue.description:
Ever look at a design and know something feels off… but you can't explain why? Gestalt principles give you the language and framework to figure it out.

Gestalt principles aren't just design theory — they're among the most practical tools we have for understanding why interfaces work (or don't).

Join Tanner Kohler as he walks through proximity, similarity, closure, figure-ground, and more, with r

queue.title: Production Engineering When Trading Billions of Dollars a Day
queue.description:
What's it like to monitor and operate software that trades billions of dollars a day on stock markets around the world?

pool.title: The Cost of Concurrency Coordination with Jon Gjengset
pool.description:
In this talk, Jon Gjengset explores the true cost of concurrency coordination – from Amdahl's law down to CPU cache lines – and what we can do about it. 

Modern hardware is moving to more cores rather than faster ones. For application developers, this means that further performance gains require _parallelism_; making progress on many tasks at the same time. But as anyone with experience writing m

pool.title: Original Hello World in "B" Programming Language - Computerphile
pool.description:
B is the forerunner to C - but seemed lost - Angelo Papenhoff decided to change it and brought it back from the brink! Here he tries to recreate Brian Kernighan's original 'Hello World' with a few wrinkles!

Angelo's B compiler is here: https://github.com/aap/b
Angelo's emulators: https://github.com/aap/blincolnlights

pool.title: Oversampling Data (Explained with Audio) - Computerphile
pool.description:
If you run out of headroom with your chosen sample rate, how do you avoid the problems of unwanted harmonics? - Dave Domminney Fowler explains how oversampling can help.

pool.title: HAI Seminar: Predicting Child Labor in Ghana's Cocoa Industry
pool.description:
Child labor remains prevalent in Ghana’s cocoa sector and is associated with adverse educational and health outcomes for children.
